'''Aliniaca Verr''' was a young [[Holodrama/Legends|holodrama]] actress from [[Balmorra/Legends|Balmorra]] popular around [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]]. She was short with long [[black]] hair and black eyes and considered cute. She was [[Gilthor Breen]]'s favorite actress.

{{Char-stub}}
